items.label: Admin access gate configured
items.notes: All admin pages and admin APIs must be behind Cloudflare Access or an equivalent authenticated admin gate.

items.label: Report page is private
items.notes: Serve admin/report/index.html only through the private admin host or protected admin path.

items.label: Public pages do not link to private admin routes
items.notes: Public navigation and public pages must not link to /admin/report/ or /api/report/seed.

items.label: Seed report remains read-only
items.notes: The report endpoint must not create, update, delete, seed, bill, or modify customer state.

items.label: Local validation completed
items.notes: Run the admin deploy validation script and npm check before deployment.
